layman_headline: Fear grips the crypto market — patience is the best play right now.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is in a fearful state with most altcoins stuck in downtrends. Bitcoin is holding near $64,500 but sucking capital away from smaller coins (56.5% dominance). Every swing candidate on our radar either has terrible chart structure (falling knives like BONK), is already overbought after a run (LDO, DEXE), or lacks clear technical support for a clean entry. Ethereum is the best of a mediocre bunch but hasn't yet reached the price level where the risk-reward makes sense.
layman_action: Wait. Don't buy anything right now. Set a price alert for Ethereum at $1,800 — if it dips there and holds, that's when the opportunity improves. Buying into fear is smart, but buying into falling knives without clear support is not.
expert_reasoning: No candidate presents a compelling risk-reward entry right now. BONK is a falling knife with -2.0 chart bias and three black crows — classic avoid signal despite RSI near 30. TRUMP has RSI at 22 (deeply oversold, our most reliable signal) but 1:1 risk-reward and -97.8% from ATH signal a structural decline, not a bounce candidate. LDO has the best chart (+0.85 bias, three white soldiers) but has already moved +51.7% in 5 days and the risk-reward is only 0.38x — terrible for a new entry. DEXE RSI is 71 (overbought). ETH is the cleanest setup but needs to pull back to $1,800 support for a proper entry with 3:1+ risk-reward. High BTC dominance at 56.5% is a headwind for all alts. Discipline demands we wait.
risk_factors: Weekend trading with geopolitical oil supply risks (CryptoSlate headline) could trigger a sharp BTC sell-off dragging all alts lower
BTC dominance at 56.5% and rising means alt capital rotation may not materialize even if BTC stabilizes
Fear & Greed at 28 could deteriorate further — fear often leads to more fear before reversal
watch_list: ETH price action around $1,800 support — a bounce there with rising volume is the BUY signal
BTC weekend price action amid geopolitical oil tensions — a breakdown below $63,000 would invalidate all alt setups
Fear & Greed index — a drop below 20 (extreme fear) often marks capitulation and better entry points
market_context: The crypto market is in a fear phase with BTC dominance elevated at 56.5%, signaling capital flight from alts to Bitcoin. Most altcoins are in downtrends with bearish chart structures, making this a patience-over-action environment.
context_banner: Market fear and high BTC dominance create a hostile environment for altcoin entries — discipline demands waiting for cleaner setups at key support levels.

key_signals.description: TRUMP RSI at 22 is deeply oversold (our most reliable signal at 80% win rate), but structural decline and poor risk-reward disqualify it as an entry.
Fear at 28 with a flat trend — not yet at extreme fear levels that historically mark capitulation buying opportunities.
Weekend oil supply geopolitical risk creates elevated chance of sudden market volatility — argues for caution.
ETH derivatives reset noted, suggesting leveraged positions have been flushed — cleaner setup forming but not yet triggered.
LDO's three white soldiers pattern is bullish but 0.38x risk-reward after a 51% 5-day run makes chasing dangerous; BONK's three black crows confirm falling knife.
